heroHeadline: Day 38: US-Israeli Operations Continue as Tehran Holds Firm on Hormuz
heroSubtitle: Al Jazeera situational update confirms Day 38 of ongoing US-Israeli attacks on Iran with no ceasefire signal, amid Tehran's rejection of Trump's Hormuz deadline and command shake-ups.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-06. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
